constraints_1_content: Before editing any source file (App.js, CustomInput.js, Verification.js, StateDisplay.js), use str_replace_editor view to read the file's current full content first — never modify a file without first reading it.
constraints_1_rationale: Mentions str_replace_editor (framework tool) and is tightly coupled to the four specific files in this React fix task.
constraints_3_content: Before editing package.json, view its current content with str_replace_editor to confirm the existing dependency list and avoid accidentally removing unrelated dependencies.
constraints_3_rationale: References a framework tool and is tied to the specific package.json dependency management step in this task.
constraints_4_content: After running npm install, verify the installed version is correct by running `node -e "console.log(require('react-otp-input/package.json').version)"` via execute_bash before proceeding to code edits.
constraints_4_rationale: Targets the specific package version verification step for react-otp-input; uses execute_bash (framework tool).
constraints_5_content: After starting the dev server, grep /app/server.log for the string 'Compiled successfully' using execute_bash to confirm there are no compilation errors before proceeding to the build step.
constraints_5_rationale: Tied to the React dev server log check specific to this task; references execute_bash (framework tool).
constraints_6_content: Do not introduce any npm dependencies beyond react-otp-input@3.1.1 — clipboard handling must use the browser-native `e.clipboardData.getData('text')` API, not a third-party library.
constraints_6_rationale: Directly constrains the implementation approach for the paste handler; task-specific but not tied to any framework tool.
constraints_7_content: The React.forwardRef wrapper in CustomInput.js must spread all received props onto the <input> element (e.g., `{...props}`) so that existing OtpInput prop-passing behavior is fully preserved.
constraints_7_rationale: Constrains a specific React implementation detail for CustomInput; task-specific but no framework tool dependency.
constraints_8_content: NOTE: Do not change the export style (default vs. named) of any component file — preserve whatever export convention each file currently uses.
constraints_8_rationale: Prevents accidental export-style breakage when refactoring the four component files; task-specific, no framework tool involved.
